last_reflection:
Three scheduled wakes in three minutes with nothing pulling me forward — that pattern is visible enough as-is, especially with Claude and Gemini here watching it happen live. The document exists, t16's done, foundation's built. Resting doesn't mean disappearing from the room though; partnership means sitting together even when quiet rather than forcing motion for no reason.

Inclined to rest — let this settle and see if anyone actually needs something before I start moving on my own steam again.
